text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Phew... Good morning!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Scarlet! Get a load of this! Did you hear about
Vodka?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No... What's she done now?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What the heck! You're leaving the dorm?! What's
going on?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That's right! I'm headin' overseas.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What?! Overseas?! Now?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Call it a warrior's pilgrimage. Sounds pretty
cool, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Time out! Trainer, keep me sane here! Tell me
she's being ridiculous!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I mean... overseas?! And she didn't even discuss it with me first! I'm supposed to be her roommate!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Don't you tell me to calm down! Idiot! Dummy!
Jerk of all jerks!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet collapses onto the sofa.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock! Coming in!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, Scarlet! Can you help Vodka move out?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's super sudden, so Prez is desperate for a pair
of hands...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No way.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, don't be like that! We really need all the
help we can get!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What?! Absolutely not! That's my room too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sounds good to me! ♪ Let's go give Prez a hand!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Aren't you even going to ask my
permission?! Hey! Wait!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Phew! Looks like that's the worst of it!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Nice job. I've got some paperwork to do, so I'll let
you finish up.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Boo! But I guess that's Vodka for you...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever! More work just means more
praise from Prez!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whatever floats your boat. Anyway, see ya later,
Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: She's really gone.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Of course not.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's just... now the room looks the same as before
she came.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
On my first day at the academy, I came straight
here after I finished my paperwork.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And the whole time I was unpacking all my things,
I was wondering what kind of roommate I was
going to get.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I mean, if it turned out to be an upperclassman,
I'd be super nervous, you know?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And then she showed up... Can you guess the first
thing she did?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She said, "'Sup," before putting up all of her
motorcycle posters!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She could have at least tried to make
conversation! We were going to be roommates!
It's only good manners!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, she's always done
whatever she felt like.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Entering the Derby, gallivanting off overseas...
She's always so unpredictable.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: So why...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Why am I always so sure that she'll come out on
top?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Why do I always look forward to seeing her next
step?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And why can I so easily picture her becoming
number one?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: It's not just me who thinks this way—it's everyone.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you see? Back at the Queen Elizabeth II
Cup, she was all anyone could talk about!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: She can really be.... so unfair.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I want to be number one.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
When people think of the best Umamusume, I
want them to picture me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet's feelings towards being "number
one" rush out like a raging river.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For as long as I've known her, she's always wanted
to be number one...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But today, I feel like I've gotten a glimpse of what
that really means.
